ops.text:
VERIFY LANE (independent recomputation, no LLM spend). VERDICT: CONFIRMED.

Recomputed all headline numbers from raw scores.npz + scores.jsonl with my own code (harness: experiments/E22/verify_lane.py), independent AUC (Mann-Whitney U, tie-averaged ranks — NOT their sentinel_auc for the primary check), fresh bootstrap seed=424242 B=10000.

POINT AUCs (my Mann-Whitney): auc_base=0.9316896744944221, auc_ret=0.9261117620090673, delta=-0.005577912485354775. Matches summary/headline to 1e-12; my MW matches their sentinel_auc to 1.1e-16 (float epsilon). frame_n=628, positives=335, negatives=293.

INSTRUMENT: p_base == stored served probs EXACTLY, max abs diff = 0.0 across all 628 rows. Reproduced independently.

BOOTSTRAP: recomputing percentiles from the stored boot_deltas array (their 2000 resamples) reproduces summary ci95=[-0.017132,+0.005839] and frac_gt0=0.1585 EXACTLY. My own fresh bootstrap (seed=424242, B=10000): ci95=[-0.01692,+0.00520], mean=-0.00567, frac>0=0.1565 — reproduces the run within resampling noise; straddles zero.

INTEGRITY: sha256(scores.jsonl/scores.npz/summary.json) == the ledger git-lfs oids EXACTLY. scores.jsonl is byte-consistent with scores.npz (p_base/p_ret/stored/labels/ids all 0.0 diff). Arms genuinely differ: all 628 rows p_ret != p_base (max|d|=0.625), aug_chars>base_chars for every row (min +2221 chars) — retrieval block was actually injected, not a vacuous no-op arm.

PRE-REGISTERED CRITERION evaluated AS REGISTERED: protocol registered B=2000 (>=1000), seed=1729, skip single-class -> run used exactly that (skipped=0); instrument gate <1e-2 -> 0.0 passes; headline fields all reported; cap $5, spend ~$0.40. No goalpost moves. PENDING-E15 discipline HELD: no promote/kill verdict stated (both entries + interpretation are CI-only descriptive; "leaning marginally harmful" is descriptive, not a kill call).

Minor note (not a discrepancy): retrieved-exemplar count per row ranges 1-3, not uniformly 3 — dedup/hydration yields fewer than top-k for some rows; "k=3" is the accurate retrieval-target label and per-row actuals are transparently in the jsonl.
